name: Haunted Dungeon Tiles & Terrain — 30-Piece Tile Set | 16×16 Pixel Art
description:
**🧱 30 METICULOUSLY CRAFTED HAUNTED DUNGEON TILES — Build Your Dungeon From The Ground Up! 🧱**

This comprehensive tile set spans floors, walls, corners, doors, and interactive props for a complete dungeon environment. **Every tile is CC0 licensed — use in commercial games, no credit needed!**

---

**📦 WHAT'S INSIDE:**

**Floors (8)** — 8 variations including cracked stone, mossy stone, smooth flagstone, blood-stained, and rune-etched. Mix & match for natural-looking dungeon floors!

**Walls (12)** — Brick wall segments (left/mid/right), 4 corner pieces (TL/TR/BL/BR), wall banner with haunted emblem, crumbling wall hole, wall torch, wall top with spikes

**Doors (2)** — Heavy iron door (closed) + Creaking door (open) — perfect for dramatic reveals!

**Interactive Props (4)** — Treasure chest (closed), treasure chest (open with loot), glowing key, magic potions (blue/green/red)

**Special Features (4)** — Ornate stone columns, hanging wall chains, brazier with spectral flame

---

**✅ ALL SPRITES:**
- 30 unique tiles (16×16 pixels)
- Transparent PNGs — compatible with any game engine
- Seamless tiling for infinite dungeon generation
- **CC0 LICENSE — commercial use, no credit required!**

**🎨 STYLE:** 0x72 Dungeon Tileset standard with Haunted Spectral palette (25 colors)
**🏆 Curator Score: 8.3/10 — Approved with Distinction!**

**💀 Perfect for:** Dungeon crawlers, roguelikes, procedural generation, RPG Maker, Godot, Unity, GameMaker, Tiled, and top-down adventure games. Seamless integration with all packs in this collection!
